title: NC State Basketball Tickets Available for 2026 ACC Tournament
summary: Tickets are now on sale for the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte, where NC State will compete.
charlotte_impact: Attending the ACC Tournament supports the local economy and showcases Charlotte as a sports destination.

title: Stanley Martin Homes Opens New Community in Sherrills Ford, NC
summary: Stanley Martin Homes celebrates the grand opening of Essence at Laurelbrook, its first ESSENCE community in the Charlotte market.
charlotte_impact: New housing developments contribute to growth and offer diverse options for residents in the Charlotte area.

title: Trump Misstates Facts About NC Case in State of the Union
summary: Trump incorrectly attributed the suspect in a Charlotte murder case to "open borders," when the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of factual accuracy in political discourse and its impact on local communities.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Hayward Has Large Plant in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based company, is a major employer in Clemmons, NC, with over 1,000 workers.
charlotte_impact: Local manufacturing plants provide jobs and contribute to the economic stability of the region.

title: Trade Shows in Charlotte Leverage Custom Canopy Tents for Brand Visibility
summary: Exhibitors in Charlotte trade shows are using custom canopy tents to enhance brand visibility and ROI.
charlotte_impact: Trade shows boost the local economy and provide opportunities for businesses to connect and grow.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President of Business Development
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is seeking a VP of Business Development.

title: Florence Regional Airport Passengers Increased in 2025
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw an increase in passengers in 2025, despite losing an American Airlines flight to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Air travel is crucial for regional connectivity and economic development in surrounding areas.

title: Thousands Demand Duke Energy Audit After Spike in Power Bills
summary: A petition calls for an audit of Duke Energy due to a recent spike in power bills, impacting many customers.
charlotte_impact: Utility costs affect residents and businesses, making transparency and accountability essential.

title: Record-Shattering Heat Expected Again on Wednesday
summary: The Charlotte area is experiencing record-breaking heat, with a change in weather expected later in the week.
charlotte_impact: Weather patterns impact daily life and raise concerns about climate change in the region.

title: Charlotte to Begin Construction on New Blue Line Station in South End
summary: Construction will begin this month on a new Blue Line rail station in Charlotte's South End, enhancing public transit.
charlotte_impact: Improved infrastructure supports growth and provides better transportation options for residents.

title: School Bus Crash Under Investigation on Matthews Road
summary: A school bus crash occurred on Matthews Township Parkway, causing concern for student safety.
charlotte_impact: Ensuring the safety of students during transportation is a top priority for the community.

title: Third Rabies Case of 2026 Reported in Lincoln County

charlotte_impact: Public health concerns require vigilance and prompt action to protect residents and animals.

title: Daily Multivitamin May Modestly Slow Cellular Aging in Seniors
summary: Research suggests that a daily multivitamin may have a small positive effect on cellular aging in older adults.

title: Search Ongoing for Missing Anson County Teen
summary: Authorities are searching for a missing teenager last seen in the Morven area of Anson County.

title: Partial Government Shutdown Could Cause Longer TSA Wait Times at Charlotte Airport
summary: Passengers at Charlotte airport are warned to expect longer TSA wait times due to a potential government shutdown.
charlotte_impact: Government shutdowns can disrupt travel and impact local airport operations.
